Bash(powershell -Command "Write-Host ''Key length:'' $env:OPENAI_API_KEY.Length; if \($env:OPENAI_API_KEY.Length -gt 10\) { Write-Host ''First 10:'' $env:OPENAI_API_KEY.Substring\(0,10\); Write-Host ''Last 6:'' $env:OPENAI_API_KEY.Substring\($env:OPENAI_API_KEY.Length-6\) } else { Write-Host ''Key appears empty or very short'' }")

Bash(powershell -Command "$key = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\(''OPENAI_API_KEY'', ''User''\); if \($key\) { Write-Host ''User env - Length:'' $key.Length; Write-Host ''First 10:'' $key.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(10,$key.Length\)\); Write-Host ''Last 6:'' $key.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0,$key.Length-6\)\) } else { Write-Host ''Not set in User environment'' }; $key2 = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\(''OPENAI_API_KEY'', ''Machine''\); if \($key2\) { Write-Host ''Machine env - Length:'' $key2.Length } else { Write-Host ''Not set in Machine environment'' }")

Bash(py -3 -c "import os; key=os.environ.get\(''OPENAI_API_KEY'',''''\); print\(''len:'', len\(key\)\); print\(''start:'', repr\(key[:12]\)\); print\(''end:'', repr\(key[-6:]\)\); print\(''has whitespace:'', key != key.strip\(\)\); print\(''has newline:'', chr\(10\) in key or chr\(13\) in key\)")
